ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the weather data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability score of the data (0-100) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor used for data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to mark data entries as deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Severna Park) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in feet */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Detailed time zone offset (e.g., -05:00) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark locations as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Mostly Cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather condition data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the weather station */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors installed at the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark stations as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Compression type used for the file (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file data was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to mark files as deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark users as active or inactive */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "is_blocked" INTEGER /* Flag to mark access attempts as blocked or allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-100) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the data (e.g., Validated, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the quality and validation process */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality data was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to mark quality records as deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
